name: Ultimate Lifestyle Corp
summary: Ultimate Lifestyle Corp offers a share in vacation homes either on full-time or shared ownership basis. The company owns, controls, and has build a property in Puerto Vallarta, Mexico that includes private residences, subdivided into different projects, each with their own common areas, an on-site tennis club, spa, gym, restaurant, lounge, clubhouse, chauffer service, and a 24/7 concierge. Further, Ultimate Lifestyle Corp develops private villas. The company was formerly known as Aztec Technology Partners, Inc. and changed its name to Ultimate Lifestyle Corp in March 2010. Ultimate Lifestyle Corp was incorporated in 1998 and is based in Henderson, Nevada. The company is a former subsidiary of Woods Cross Holding Corp.
